hero.title: Your documents, understood.
hero.subtitle: Arabic-native enterprise RAG. Upload invoices, contracts, quotations — ask in Arabic or English, get cited answers.

trustBar.heading: Trusted by teams across the region

problem.title: Every Arabic business runs on messy documents.
problem.subtitle: Handwritten invoices. WhatsApp photos. Scanned PDFs. Mixed AR/EN tables. Every OCR fails on at least one of these.

items.title: Handwritten Invoices
items.desc: Scribbled totals and Arabic calligraphy that standard OCR cannot parse.

items.title: WhatsApp Photos
items.desc: Blurry phone shots of receipts, forwarded through chats.

items.title: Scanned PDFs
items.desc: Low-res scans with stamps, watermarks and compression noise.

items.title: Mixed AR / EN
items.desc: Documents mixing both scripts with inconsistent direction.

items.title: Inconsistent Formats
items.desc: Every supplier invents their own layout, table shape and field order.

pipeline.title: Four steps from chaos to query.

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Drop any Arabic document. PDF, scan, photo — we handle the mess.

steps.title: Extract
steps.desc: Our extraction engine reads every character, stamp, and annotation.

steps.title: Structure
steps.desc: Validated JSON: issuer, recipient, line items, totals, dates — normalized and bilingual.

steps.title: Query
steps.desc: Ask in Arabic or English. Get cited answers from your full corpus.

demo.title: Ask anything. Get cited answers.
demo.subtitle: Every response links back to the exact invoice page it came from.
demo.userMessageEn: What is the total on invoice INV-2024-0341?

features.title: Built for bilingual enterprise work.
features.subtitle: Every feature is there because a document failed without it.

items.title: Intelligent Extraction
items.desc: Reads handwriting, stamps, logos and tables the way a human accountant would.

items.title: Arabic Character Disambiguation
items.desc: Multi-pass reasoning distinguishes ث from ش and ب from ت, consistently.

items.title: Hybrid Search
items.desc: Semantic + keyword retrieval runs in parallel to maximize recall on numerical and named fields.

items.title: Bilingual Queries
items.desc: Ask in Arabic or English. Answers always cite in the document's original language.

items.title: Structured Output
items.desc: Clean JSON per document: parties, line items, totals, dates, terms and notes.

items.title: Live Indexing
items.desc: Upload and watch documents go from Processing to Indexed in seconds.

bilingualProof.title: Arabic is not a fallback.
bilingualProof.subtitle: Both scripts render at equal weight in every context.

stats.title: Proven on real Arabic enterprise docs.
